title: Add Integration Setup Modals for External Data Sources
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a documentation modal when connecting to an external data source like Snowflake or HubSpot, so that I understand the integration before setting up a new connection.
description:
When a user attempts to get data from an external source (Snowflake, HubSpot), the application should display a controlled modal with:

1. **Documentation content** pulled from WordPress tutorials explaining the integration
2. **Call-to-action button** to navigate to the correct settings page for connection setup

This intercepts the external source action and provides contextual help before directing the user to settings.

### WordPress Tutorial Pages
- Salesforce: existing tutorial (post 10847)
- Snowflake: cloned tutorial (post 11061)
- HubSpot: cloned tutorial (post 11089)
acceptance_criteria: Clicking an external source option (Snowflake, HubSpot) shows a modal with integration documentation
Modal content is sourced from WordPress tutorial pages
Modal includes a button to navigate to the settings page for connection setup
Each external source has its own dedicated tutorial content
Modal can be dismissed to return to the previous view
ux_changes: New modals displayed when selecting external data sources (Snowflake, HubSpot). Modals show WordPress-sourced documentation with a CTA to the settings page.
middleware_changes: Integration between the app and WordPress CMS to fetch and display tutorial content in modals. WordPress post IDs mapped to each external source.
implementation_notes: Tutorial pages were cloned from the existing Salesforce tutorial in WordPress. WordPress post IDs are mapped to each source: Salesforce (10847), Snowflake (11061), HubSpot (11089). The modal content is fetched from these WordPress pages.
comment_summary: Developer cloned the Salesforce tutorial for Snowflake and HubSpot. Reporter provided updated WordPress post IDs after accidentally deleting the original comments. Implementation deployed to development.
